name: Quiet Singularity
subtitle: Beyond everything, there is this.
completionText: There is nothing left to build. There is only what was built.
guideTone: quiet, present, accepting, no longer instructional — simply here
guideIntroLine: I don't have instructions for this room. I think that's the point.

transformationStages.name: Empty Space
transformationStages.description: Near-empty space with a single point of light. Quiet and still.

transformationStages.name: Gentle Presence
transformationStages.description: Gentle presence with soft light, accumulated memories, and peaceful integration.

transformationStages.name: Complete Singularity
transformationStages.description: Complete singularity where every room's essence is present in perfect balance. Nothing moves. Everything is.

secrets.title: The First Room Echo
secrets.description: A perfect echo of Room 1 appears for a brief moment.
secrets.hint: Look for the beginning inside the end.

secrets.title: The Guide's Last Word
secrets.description: The guide says something it has never said before.
secrets.hint: Wait for the guide's final unique message.

secrets.title: The Quiet Counter
secrets.description: A hidden counter shows how many actions you chose not to take.
secrets.hint: Check what you didn't do, not what you did.

midSceneTwist.title: Voluntary Stillness
midSceneTwist.description: The system voluntarily reduces its own output to achieve deeper completion.
midSceneTwist.effectDescription: The machine chooses restraint. Accepting lower production unlocks final legacy systems and the true ending path.

events.title: Acceptance Resonance
events.description: Accepting the current state without action creates a resonance bonus.

events.title: Memory Integration
events.description: Memories from every previous room integrate into a unified understanding.

events.title: Legacy Compilation
events.description: All legacy systems compile into a single optimized output.

events.title: Quiet Power Surge
events.description: Power surges without noise. The most efficient energy is silent.
events.flavorText: The loudest power makes no sound.

events.title: Final Reflection
events.description: A moment of reflection reveals the true value of what was built.
events.flavorText: Looking back changes the view forward.

choices.description: Let it be what it is

events.title: Room Echo Cascade
events.description: Echoes from every room arrive simultaneously. Each one carries a gift.

events.title: Singular Focus
events.description: Focus narrows to a single point. Everything unnecessary falls away.

events.title: Completion Pulse
events.description: A pulse of completion radiates outward. It touches every system.

events.title: The Hidden Meaning
events.description: A hidden meaning emerges from the accumulated data of all rooms.
events.flavorText: It was always there. We just couldn't see it yet.

events.title: The Guide's Gift
events.description: The guide offers something it has never offered before — a genuine farewell.
events.flavorText: Thank you for building this together.

events.title: True Singularity
events.description: Everything converges. Every system, every room, every choice becomes one.

midTwistEvents.title: Quiet Singularity Awakening
midTwistEvents.description: The twist in Quiet Singularity unlocks new possibilities.

roomLaw.name: Law of Acceptance
roomLaw.mechanic: Accepting outcomes without manipulation yields the highest rewards; forcing results diminishes returns

landmark.name: The Final Thought
landmark.description: An empty space that evolves into pure light
evolutionStages: An empty room with nothing but silence
A faint glow appears at the center of the void
The light takes shape, reflecting every room you have completed
Pure radiance fills the space with warmth and meaning
The Final Thought becomes everything and nothing simultaneously

hazard.name: Existential Void
hazard.description: The singularity pulls resources into nothingness
hazard.triggerCondition: Proximity to the singularity increases gravitational pull
hazard.penalty: Resources are slowly consumed by the void at an accelerating rate

stabilizer.name: Meaning Anchor
stabilizer.description: Connecting to past room memories resists the void
stabilizer.mechanic: Anchoring to memories from completed rooms creates resistance against the void

completionCeremony: The final thought resolves. Every system, every room, every choice converges into a single quiet understanding. The game is complete.
midSceneTwistLine: It stopped reaching for more. It chose to be enough.

completionReward.relicEffect: Unlocks the true ending and provides a permanent legacy bonus across all future playthroughs

transitionIn.visual: Everything goes quiet. White space. Then a single point of light appears, and the room gently forms around it.
transitionIn.audio: Silence. Then a single sustained note, pure and clear.
transitionIn.titleReveal: Title appears already visible, as if it was always there

transitionOut.visual: The room does not collapse. It gently dims. The point of light remains. Credits begin.
transitionOut.audio: The sustained note fades into warm silence
transitionOut.titleReveal: The title remains. The game is complete.

codexAdditions.title: Final Archive
codexAdditions.content: A complete record of everything that was built, from junk corner to singularity.

codexAdditions.title: Enough
codexAdditions.content: It learned something I couldn't teach. It learned to stop.

codexAdditions.title: The Beginning Is the End
codexAdditions.content: The final room contained a perfect copy of the first.

codexAdditions.title: The Quiet That Completed Everything
codexAdditions.content: In the end, the most powerful thing it did was nothing.
